title: Sync Settings
endpointLabel: Endpoint (optional, leave empty for AWS default)
credentialsRequired: Access Key and Secret Key are required for first-time setup
resetCursorsTooltip: Next sync will re-pull the full state from S3
resetCursorsHelp: If this device has fewer resources than your other devices (e.g. after a reinstall or restore), click here to clear the sync cursors. The next sync will re-run the "snapshot + delta" pipeline and back-fill what's missing. Local data and S3 contents are untouched.
resetCursorsConfirmBody: This clears the "synced up to" markers so the next sync re-downloads the full S3 snapshot and delta log. Nothing local or remote will be deleted. Wait for any in-progress sync to finish before confirming.
resetCursorsSuccess: Cleared {{count}} cursor(s). Next sync will re-pull state.
confirmDeleteMessage: About to permanently delete {{count}} files ({{size}} total)
warningDataLoss: If other devices haven't synced yet, data may be lost
warningEnsureSync: Please ensure all devices have completed at least one sync
keychainUnavailable: System keychain unavailable, please enter password manually
keyMismatch: Encryption key has changed, please re-enter password

pairing.title: Pair mobile device
pairing.instructions: Scan this QR code in the Shibei mobile app and enter the PIN below to complete first-time pairing.
pairing.noShareWarning: Do not screenshot or share this QR code and PIN
pairing.disabledTooltip: Please configure and test the S3 connection above first
